query_text: Find goal kicks where the first pass forced the press to jump.
description: Reference gap fixture for reconstructed restart anchors. The football meaning is represented, but the restart-taken operationalization is not yet executable.

scope.summary: Selected matches and dead-ball restart-like moments near a team's own goal area.

anchor.summary: A reconstructed goal-kick restart candidate where the ball becomes live from a stationary restart configuration.

bind.summary: Restarting team, ball, contact candidate, nearby pressure unit, and goal-area region.

measure.summary: Measure stationary-ball interval, restart location, first live-ball transition, and post-restart pressure change.

match.summary: Require a valid restart candidate followed by a press-jump response inside a declared time window.

outcome.summary: Classify candidate restarts where pressure jumps after the first short restart pass.

judge.summary: Do not claim GOAL_KICK_AWARDED without last-touch and stoppage evidence; only candidate restart evidence is in scope.

return.summary: Return the typed gap, required evidence obligations, and any executable prefix once the anchor operationalization exists.

expected_input.name: dead_ball_state
expected_input.description: Whether the ball is out of active play before the restart-like action.

expected_input.name: ball_location
expected_input.description: Ball position during the stationary restart setup.

expected_input.name: contact_candidate
expected_input.description: Player candidate for the restart contact.

expected_input.name: ball_motion_transition
expected_input.description: First live-ball transition after the stationary interval.

declared_gaps.claim_boundary: Can at most support a restart candidate until authoritative stoppage and last-touch evidence exist.
